hero.description: We deliver reliable low-voltage electrical solutions for industrial and commercial projects — from equipment supply to full installation and final system validation.

aboutPreview.description: Star Dewedar Co. is specialized in supplying and installing low-voltage electrical equipment for industrial and commercial projects. We focus on delivering practical, efficient, and reliable solutions tailored to real-world requirements.
aboutPreview.approachDesc: From reviewing technical documents to final project delivery, we follow a structured workflow that guarantees performance, safety, and timely execution.

productCards.desc1: Custom-designed control centers for heavy power regulation and distribution.
productCards.desc2: Heavy-duty LED arrays designed for maximum visibility in high-heat environments.
productCards.desc3: Replacement parts and specialized gear for mission-critical maintenance.

successPartners.title: TRUSTED BY INDUSTRY LEADERS
successPartners.description: Star Dewedar has partnered with some of the world's most respected companies to deliver high-performance electrical and lighting solutions.

whyChooseUs.feature1Desc: We ensure every project meets strict performance and safety standards through careful planning and professional installation.
whyChooseUs.feature2Desc: By selecting the right equipment and executing efficiently, we complete projects on time without compromising quality.
whyChooseUs.feature3Desc: Our engineers and technicians bring strong field experience to handle complex electrical systems with confidence.

ctaBanner.title: Partner with the Experts. Request a Quote Today.

footer.brandDescription: Star Dewidar Company is one of the leading companies in the field of supplying and installing low-voltage electrical equipment. The company is managed by highly efficient, trained engineers and technicians.

about.heroDesc: Star Dewedar Co. specializes in supplying and installing electrical equipment for industrial and commercial projects with precision, reliability, and efficiency.
about.whoWeAreP1: Star Dewedar Co. is a leading company in the field of civil and electrical works, specializing in supplying and installing low-voltage electrical equipment.
about.whoWeAreP2: Our operations are handled by highly trained engineers and skilled technicians, ensuring every project is delivered with accuracy, safety, and long-term reliability.
about.workflow1: Reviewing technical documents and project requirements
about.workflow2: Official testing & validation with national electricity authorities
about.workflow4: Final delivery with full system inspection and verification
about.strength1Desc: We ensure every electrical project operates at maximum performance by selecting optimal solutions tailored to real industrial needs.
about.strength2Desc: We balance cost and performance by choosing the most suitable equipment and delivering projects within tight deadlines.
about.strength3Desc: Our engineers and technicians bring years of hands-on experience in electrical systems, ensuring reliable execution.
about.ctaDesc: Partner with Star Dewedar for reliable electrical solutions built on engineering precision and execution excellence.

contact.heroDesc: Connect with Star Dewedar's technical department for industrial supply or high-voltage engineering consultations.
contact.officeAddressText: Fayrouz Tower, Othman mohamed st, off Modoreya st, Tanta
contact.storeAddressText: El madares st, off el nahas st, Tanta

requestVisit.heroDesc: Our senior engineers provide comprehensive on-site technical evaluations for complex power systems and lighting infrastructures. We identify critical inefficiencies and engineer scalable solutions designed for the heavy industrial sector.
requestVisit.technicalDetailsPlaceholder: DESCRIBE SPECIFIC TECHNICAL ISSUES OR PROJECT SCOPE...

requestQuote.sidebarDesc: Submit your technical specifications for a comprehensive architectural and electrical evaluation. Our lead engineers review every proposal within 24 hours.
requestQuote.projectScopePlaceholder: Describe the load requirements, site conditions, and voltage specifications...

products.heroDesc: Premium industrial electrical solutions built for long-term operational integrity and resilience.
products.noProducts: No products match your current filters.

projects.heroDesc: From industrial facilities to commercial infrastructures, Star Dewedar delivers high-performance electrical solutions. Our projects include low-voltage panels, power distribution systems, and advanced lighting installations — engineered for reliability, safety, and long-term operation.
projects.ctaDesc: Our engineering team specializes in non-standard industrial environments and extreme load requirements.
